updates.name: GPT-5.3 Instant
updates.description: OpenAI's latest model update reduces hallucinations by 27%, cuts unnecessary refusals, and delivers richer web search results. Available to all ChatGPT users and via API.

updates.name: Perplexity Computer
updates.description: An autonomous multi-agent system that plans, builds, and executes complex workflows using 19 AI models. It creates sub-agents on the fly and can run tasks for hours or months.

updates.name: Notion Custom Agents
updates.description: Autonomous AI agents that automate recurring work across Notion, Slack, Mail, and Calendar. Set a trigger or schedule and they run 24/7. Free to try through May 2026.

updates.name: Gmail AI (Gemini 3)
updates.description: Gmail's Gemini-powered overhaul adds AI Overviews that summarize long threads, smart compose with Help Me Write, one-click Suggested Replies, and an AI Inbox that filters clutter.

updates.name: Wispr Flow for Android
updates.description: AI voice-to-text that auto-edits your speech, removes filler words, fixes grammar, and writes 4x faster than typing. Now free with unlimited dictation on Android, supporting 100+ languages.

updates.name: Google Pixel March Drop (Circle to Search)
updates.description: Circle to Search now recognizes multiple objects simultaneously — identify every plant, character, or dish on screen at once. Plus Magic Cue integrates Gemini suggestions directly into chats.

updates.name: Pomelli Photoshoot
updates.description: Google Labs' latest Pomelli feature transforms ordinary product photos into studio-quality shots using Nano Banana image generation. Also added Pomelli Animate for one-click video from static content.

updates.name: Samsung Galaxy S26 AI (Now Nudge + Photo Assist)
updates.description: Now Nudge proactively suggests actions based on screen context (auto-pull photos when a friend asks, detect calendar conflicts). Photo Assist lets you edit images with natural language descriptions.

updates.name: Parsewise
updates.description: AI agents that parse entire document corpora at scale for underwriting, claims, and diligence workflows. Cross-references thousands of docs in one run with full source traceability. YC-backed.

updates.name: Supa Social
updates.description: Self-hosted community platform with built-in auth, moderation, roles, and feeds. A ready-to-deploy foundation for micro-communities so you own your platform instead of renting it.
